overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game featuring a samurai character traversing a misty Japanese wetland landscape. The character moves through tall grass and shallow water toward a traditional wooden gate and manor house under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty wetland with tall grass and shallow water

agents.ego_description: samurai character running through tall grass and shallow water toward a distant wooden gate

entered.detail: dense tall green grass swaying in the wind
calm reflective water covering the ground surface
sparse deciduous trees with thin trunks scattered across the landscape
low-lying white mist hovering over the distant landscape
large traditional Japanese gate structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The samurai character runs through a misty wetland landscape with tall grass and shallow water. The scene is open with scattered trees and a large wooden gate visible in the distance under an overcast sky.

events.description: character passes under the large wooden gate structure

agents.ego_description: samurai running toward and passing through the wooden gate

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail leading through the gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes under a large traditional wooden gate. The ground transitions from water to a dirt path, and the sky becomes partially obscured by the gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to traditional Japanese manor house

events.description: fire pit with flames becomes visible near the manor house

agents.ego_description: samurai running along the path toward the large wooden manor with smoke rising from it

entered.detail: large two-story wooden Japanese building with tiled roof
cart loaded with sacks or goods
burning fire with orange flames and smoke

segments.scene_description: After passing the gate, the character approaches a large traditional wooden manor house. A fire pit burns near a wooden cart on the right side of the path, and smoke rises from the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty wetland that transitions into the structured grounds of a traditional estate. It begins with the samurai running through an open landscape of tall grass and shallow water under an overcast sky, with a distant wooden gate serving as the focal point. As the character advances, the camera follows him beneath the massive wooden gate, where the terrain shifts from water to a firm dirt path. The scene then opens up to reveal a large traditional wooden manor house, passing a burning fire pit and a wooden cart as smoke rises from the building.
